technologies.name: Datadog
technologies.evidence: Crest Data provides comprehensive enterprise migration services and purpose-build AI-driven tools that facilitate effortless transitions between various data analysis, and monitoring tools, with a focus on observability and security analytics use-cases. The New Relic to Datadog Migration Platform is an innovative Application designed to facilitate the seamless migration of visualizations from New Relic to Datadog.
technologies.reasoning: Datadog is explicitly mentioned as a tool that Crest Data helps migrate to and from, indicating its usage in observability and security analytics.
